name: FreelancerReviewWriter

ironRules.rule: Direction check (CLIENT_TO_FREELANCER or FREELANCER_TO_CLIENT) at ORDER 1 — compile-time constant VALID_REVIEW_DIRECTIONS. Invalid direction rejected immediately.
Duplicate direction check at ORDER 2 — one review per direction per engagement. DuplicateReviewRejected emitted on duplicate.
Write review at ORDER 3 — storeDocument only, never updateDocument. Append-only: no modification after submission.
storeDocument(audit) at ORDER 4 — comment field EXCLUDED from audit record. PLATFORM_ONLY must not contain comment text. DNA-8.
FreelancerReviewSubmitted emitted at ORDER 5 — only after audit confirmed. Comment excluded from event payload.

keywords: freelancer review writer CLIENT_TO_FREELANCER FREELANCER_TO_CLIENT direction duplicate append-only comment excluded PLATFORM_ONLY FreelancerReviewSubmitted DuplicateReviewRejected T616
